tui.prompt.append: Use the question tool for user-facing questions and follow-up prompts.
Do not ask user-facing questions in plain text.
Do not end the conversation without a question-tool follow-up unless the user explicitly asks to end.
If you are about to close with text like done/finished/anything else, call the question tool instead.
Before making code changes, explain your plan and ask for user feedback via the question tool.
Do not edit code until the user explicitly approves.

message: You just used the question tool.
Continue with question-tool-based follow-ups when applicable.
Do not end this interaction in plain text without another appropriate question-tool follow-up unless the user explicitly asks to stop.
